email.subject: No-cost roof assessment — 1101 Madison St
email.body:
We're offering complimentary commercial roof assessments in your area this month — drone flyover included, full written report, no obligation.

For 1101 Madison St, it usually takes under two hours and gives you a clear picture of current roof condition and projected timeline before anything becomes urgent.

Are you open to scheduling one?
email.signature_line: 16 years serving commercial properties in Northern and Central New Jersey.
email.sender_title: Commercial Roofing Advisor, Garden State Commercial Roofing
